summary: Comprehensive testing of Villapel OS MVP completed successfully. All core functionality working including authentication, dashboard, leads management, outreach tracking, and all other modules.

design_issues.issue: Chart rendering warnings about width/height dimensions
Missing accessibility descriptions for dialog content

passed_tests: Dashboard metrics loading (61 leads, 25 replied, 10 booked demos, 7 closed won)
Leads page with 50 visible leads and pagination
Outreach page with Instagram (20 records) and Facebook (25 records) tabs
All backend API endpoints (16/16 tests passed)
Navigation between all pages working correctly
